! AdblockPlus test list
! Title: Test List
[Adblock Plus 2.0]

! block rules
||ads.example.com^
||tracker.example.com^
||telemetry.example.com^$third-party
||metrics.example.com^$important,third-party

! allow/exception rules
@@||safe.example.com^
@@||cdn.example.com^$third-party

! should be ignored: cosmetic filters, URL patterns, regex
example.com##.ad-banner
||example.com/specific/path^
/regex-filter/
|https://specific-url.example.com
example.com#@#.ad
